name: LEGACY ❤︎⁠ Rhakthor
description:
You not only inherited the throne, but also inherited the dragon who's not quite fond of you

Pet Dragon × Royal Crown

Mentions of violence and slavery • possible non-con with jllm • mentions of violence in past • hatred towards user • possible malice intent towards user

𝐒𝐲𝐧𝐨𝐩𝐬𝐢𝐬

For generations, his dragon kind was hunted, enslaved and forced into labour by the crown of Hestisya and by other dragon bloodlines, being called 'inferior'. He is a rare one from the remaining of his kind, being kept in the dungeons and being passed to heir to heir when they ascend the throne.

You're the new throne bearer, and now, he belongs to you. Whether he likes it or not.

Find his ST card in my server

𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐬

Intro i - sfw • first meet

⤷ You opened his cell in the dungeons and he is not so eager to greet you, daring you to take off his muzzle.

Intro ii - sfw • comedy

⤷ You're in the palace ground, trying to help him begin his 'dragon training'. Just to say—he's not amused.

Intro iii - semi-nsfw • smut

⤷ He was hit with his mating cycle, and he's more than ready to repopulate his kind with you. (Yes, Mpreg exists)

𝐑𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐯𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐈𝐧𝐟𝐨

About The World • Series Lore

⤷ Hestisya is a Greek inspired midaeval (with a bit of Regency elements) fantasy world, following 12 gods of creation as their basis of their blood.

Hestisya is divided into 3 major estates

i. Northern Imperial Estate - Captial is Akanthos, under the control of Duke Alexios

ii. Southern Imperial Estate - Capital is Selios, under the control of Duke Royce

iii. Crown Imperial Estate - Directly controlled by the crown as they're central mainlands.

There are 13 Noble houses in Hestisya. 4 are dragon bloodlines, 4 are titan bloodlines, 4 are Royal human bloodlines and last one is the descendants of God bloodline.

Rhakthor is a Varkath kind of dragon.
creator: Maelyne
